  exact Set.Countable.measure_zero (Set.countable_range _)

  simp only [not_not]

rw [ae_iff]
  have : {x : ℝ | ¬Irrational x} = ⋃ q : ℚ, {(q : ℝ)} := by
    ext x
    simp only [mem_setOf_eq, mem_iUnion, mem_singleton_iff]
    constructor
    · intro h
      simp only [Irrational, not_not] at h
      obtain ⟨q, rfl⟩ := h

    · rintro ⟨q, rfl⟩
      exact not_irrational_rat q
  rw [this]
  exact Measure.measure_iUnion_null fun q => measure_singleton (q : ℝ)

rw [ae_iff]
  have : {x : ℝ | ¬Irrational x} = ⋃ q : ℚ, {(q : ℝ)} := by

    simp only [mem_setOf_eq, mem_iUnion, mem_singleton_iff]
